) AS `t` ON `a`.`ChildId` = `t`.`Id`

SELECT `d`.`Id`, `d`.`CreatedAt`, `d`.`Description`, `d`.`IsDeleted`, `d`.`Language`, `d`.`Name`, `d`.`UpdatedAt`, `t`.`Id`, `t`.`AgeCategory`, `t`.`CreatedAt`, `t`.`DivisionId`, `t`.`IsDeleted`, `t`.`Language`, `t`.`MaxChildCount`, `t`.`Name`, `t`.`TeacherId`, `t`.`UpdatedAt`
FROM `divisions` AS `d`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `g`.`Id`, `g`.`AgeCategory`, `g`.`CreatedAt`, `g`.`DivisionId`, `g`.`IsDeleted`, `g`.`Language`, `g`.`MaxChildCount`, `g`.`Name`, `g`.`TeacherId`, `g`.`UpdatedAt`

    WHERE NOT (`g`.`IsDeleted`)

) AS `t0` ON `g`.`Id` = `t0`.`GroupId`
WHERE NOT (`g`.`IsDeleted`)

    SELECT `d`.`Id`, `d`.`CreatedAt`, `d`.`Description`, `d`.`IsDeleted`, `d`.`Language`, `d`.`Name`, `d`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `divisions` AS `d`
    WHERE NOT (`d`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t` ON `g`.`DivisionId` = `t`.`Id`
INNER JOIN `AspNetUsers` AS `a` ON `g`.`TeacherId` = `a`.`Id`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `c`.`Id`, `c`.`CreatedAt`, `c`.`DateOfBirth`, `c`.`FaceIdToken`, `c`.`FirstName`, `c`.`GroupId`, `c`.`IsDeleted`, `c`.`LastName`, `c`.`MonthlyFee`, `c`.`ParentEmail`, `c`.`ParentFullName`, `c`.`ParentPhone`, `c`.`RegistrationDate`, `c`.`ScheduleType`, `c`.`Status`, `c`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `children` AS `c`
    WHERE NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`) AND NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t0` ON `g`.`Id` = `t0`.`GroupId`
WHERE NOT (`g`.`IsDeleted`)
ORDER BY `g`.`Id`, `t`.`Id`, `a`.`Id`

INNER JOIN `AspNetUsers` AS `a` ON `g`.`TeacherId` = `a`.`Id`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `c`.`Id`, `c`.`CreatedAt`, `c`.`DateOfBirth`, `c`.`FaceIdToken`, `c`.`FirstName`, `c`.`GroupId`, `c`.`IsDeleted`, `c`.`LastName`, `c`.`MonthlyFee`, `c`.`ParentEmail`, `c`.`ParentFullName`, `c`.`ParentPhone`, `c`.`RegistrationDate`, `c`.`ScheduleType`, `c`.`Status`, `c`.`UpdatedAt`

) AS `t0` ON `g`.`Id` = `t0`.`GroupId`
WHERE NOT (`g`.`IsDeleted`)
ORDER BY `g`.`Id`, `t`.`Id`, `a`.`Id`

SELECT `p`.`Id`, `p`.`ChildId`, `p`.`CreatedAt`, `p`.`DiscountType`, `p`.`DiscountValue`, `p`.`FinalAmount`, `p`.`IsDeleted`, `p`.`Month`, `p`.`Notes`, `p`.`OriginalAmount`, `p`.`PaidAmount`, `p`.`PaymentDate`, `p`.`RecordedById`, `p`.`Status`, `p`.`UpdatedAt`, `p`.`Year`, `t`.`Id`, `t`.`CreatedAt`, `t`.`DateOfBirth`, `t`.`FaceIdToken`, `t`.`FirstName`, `t`.`GroupId`, `t`.`IsDeleted`, `t`.`LastName`, `t`.`MonthlyFee`, `t`.`ParentEmail`, `t`.`ParentFullName`, `t`.`ParentPhone`, `t`.`RegistrationDate`, `t`.`ScheduleType`, `t`.`Status`, `t`.`UpdatedAt`, `t0`.`Id`, `t0`.`AgeCategory`, `t0`.`CreatedAt`, `t0`.`DivisionId`, `t0`.`IsDeleted`, `t0`.`Language`, `t0`.`MaxChildCount`, `t0`.`Name`, `t0`.`TeacherId`, `t0`.`UpdatedAt`, `t1`.`Id`, `t1`.`CreatedAt`, `t1`.`Description`, `t1`.`IsDeleted`, `t1`.`Language`, `t1`.`Name`, `t1`.`UpdatedAt`
FROM `payments` AS `p`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `c`.`Id`, `c`.`CreatedAt`, `c`.`DateOfBirth`, `c`.`FaceIdToken`, `c`.`FirstName`, `c`.`GroupId`, `c`.`IsDeleted`, `c`.`LastName`, `c`.`MonthlyFee`, `c`.`ParentEmail`, `c`.`ParentFullName`, `c`.`ParentPhone`, `c`.`RegistrationDate`, `c`.`ScheduleType`, `c`.`Status`, `c`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `children` AS `c`
    WHERE NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t` ON `p`.`ChildId` = `t`.`Id`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `g`.`Id`, `g`.`AgeCategory`, `g`.`CreatedAt`, `g`.`DivisionId`, `g`.`IsDeleted`, `g`.`Language`, `g`.`MaxChildCount`, `g`.`Name`, `g`.`TeacherId`, `g`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `groups` AS `g`
    WHERE NOT (`g`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t0` ON `t`.`GroupId` = `t0`.`Id`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `d`.`Id`, `d`.`CreatedAt`, `d`.`Description`, `d`.`IsDeleted`, `d`.`Language`, `d`.`Name`, `d`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `divisions` AS `d`
    WHERE NOT (`d`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t1` ON `t0`.`DivisionId` = `t1`.`Id`
WHERE NOT (`p`.`IsDeleted`) AND `p`.`Status` IN (2, 1)
ORDER BY `p`.`Year` DESC, `p`.`Month` DESC

FROM `payments` AS `p`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `c`.`Id`, `c`.`CreatedAt`, `c`.`DateOfBirth`, `c`.`FaceIdToken`, `c`.`FirstName`, `c`.`GroupId`, `c`.`IsDeleted`, `c`.`LastName`, `c`.`MonthlyFee`, `c`.`ParentEmail`, `c`.`ParentFullName`, `c`.`ParentPhone`, `c`.`RegistrationDate`, `c`.`ScheduleType`, `c`.`Status`, `c`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `children` AS `c`
    WHERE NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t` ON `p`.`ChildId` = `t`.`Id`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `g`.`Id`, `g`.`AgeCategory`, `g`.`CreatedAt`, `g`.`DivisionId`, `g`.`IsDeleted`, `g`.`Language`, `g`.`MaxChildCount`, `g`.`Name`, `g`.`TeacherId`, `g`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `groups` AS `g`
    WHERE NOT (`g`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t0` ON `t`.`GroupId` = `t0`.`Id`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `d`.`Id`, `d`.`CreatedAt`, `d`.`Description`, `d`.`IsDeleted`, `d`.`Language`, `d`.`Name`, `d`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `divisions` AS `d`
    WHERE NOT (`d`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t1` ON `t0`.`DivisionId` = `t1`.`Id`
WHERE NOT (`p`.`IsDeleted`) AND `p`.`Status` IN (2, 1)
ORDER BY `p`.`Year` DESC, `p`.`Month` DESC

    SELECT `d`.`Id`, `d`.`CreatedAt`, `d`.`Description`, `d`.`IsDeleted`, `d`.`Language`, `d`.`Name`, `d`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `divisions` AS `d`
    WHERE NOT (`d`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t` ON `g`.`DivisionId` = `t`.`Id`
INNER JOIN `AspNetUsers` AS `a` ON `g`.`TeacherId` = `a`.`Id`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `c`.`Id`, `c`.`CreatedAt`, `c`.`DateOfBirth`, `c`.`FaceIdToken`, `c`.`FirstName`, `c`.`GroupId`, `c`.`IsDeleted`, `c`.`LastName`, `c`.`MonthlyFee`, `c`.`ParentEmail`, `c`.`ParentFullName`, `c`.`ParentPhone`, `c`.`RegistrationDate`, `c`.`ScheduleType`, `c`.`Status`, `c`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `children` AS `c`
    WHERE NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`) AND NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t0` ON `g`.`Id` = `t0`.`GroupId`
WHERE NOT (`g`.`IsDeleted`)
ORDER BY `g`.`Id`, `t`.`Id`, `a`.`Id`

    FROM `children` AS `c`
    WHERE NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t` ON `p`.`ChildId` = `t`.`Id`

SELECT `g`.`Id`, `g`.`AgeCategory`, `g`.`CreatedAt`, `g`.`DivisionId`, `g`.`IsDeleted`, `g`.`Language`, `g`.`MaxChildCount`, `g`.`Name`, `g`.`TeacherId`, `g`.`UpdatedAt`, `t`.`Id`, `t`.`CreatedAt`, `t`.`Description`, `t`.`IsDeleted`, `t`.`Language`, `t`.`Name`, `t`.`UpdatedAt`, `a`.`Id`, `a`.`AccessFailedCount`, `a`.`ConcurrencyStamp`, `a`.`CreatedAt`, `a`.`Email`, `a`.`EmailConfirmed`, `a`.`FirstName`, `a`.`IsActive`, `a`.`LastName`, `a`.`LockoutEnabled`, `a`.`LockoutEnd`, `a`.`NormalizedEmail`, `a`.`NormalizedUserName`, `a`.`PasswordHash`, `a`.`PhoneNumber`, `a`.`PhoneNumberConfirmed`, `a`.`Role`, `a`.`SecurityStamp`, `a`.`TwoFactorEnabled`, `a`.`UserName`, `t0`.`Id`, `t0`.`CreatedAt`, `t0`.`DateOfBirth`, `t0`.`FaceIdToken`, `t0`.`FirstName`, `t0`.`GroupId`, `t0`.`IsDeleted`, `t0`.`LastName`, `t0`.`MonthlyFee`, `t0`.`ParentEmail`, `t0`.`ParentFullName`, `t0`.`ParentPhone`, `t0`.`RegistrationDate`, `t0`.`ScheduleType`, `t0`.`Status`, `t0`.`UpdatedAt`
FROM `groups` AS `g`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `d`.`Id`, `d`.`CreatedAt`, `d`.`Description`, `d`.`IsDeleted`, `d`.`Language`, `d`.`Name`, `d`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `divisions` AS `d`
    WHERE NOT (`d`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t` ON `g`.`DivisionId` = `t`.`Id`
INNER JOIN `AspNetUsers` AS `a` ON `g`.`TeacherId` = `a`.`Id`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `c`.`Id`, `c`.`CreatedAt`, `c`.`DateOfBirth`, `c`.`FaceIdToken`, `c`.`FirstName`, `c`.`GroupId`, `c`.`IsDeleted`, `c`.`LastName`, `c`.`MonthlyFee`, `c`.`ParentEmail`, `c`.`ParentFullName`, `c`.`ParentPhone`, `c`.`RegistrationDate`, `c`.`ScheduleType`, `c`.`Status`, `c`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `children` AS `c`
    WHERE NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`) AND NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t0` ON `g`.`Id` = `t0`.`GroupId`
WHERE NOT (`g`.`IsDeleted`)
ORDER BY `g`.`Id`, `t`.`Id`, `a`.`Id`

SELECT `g`.`Id`, `g`.`AgeCategory`, `g`.`CreatedAt`, `g`.`DivisionId`, `g`.`IsDeleted`, `g`.`Language`, `g`.`MaxChildCount`, `g`.`Name`, `g`.`TeacherId`, `g`.`UpdatedAt`, `t`.`Id`, `t`.`CreatedAt`, `t`.`Description`, `t`.`IsDeleted`, `t`.`Language`, `t`.`Name`, `t`.`UpdatedAt`, `a`.`Id`, `a`.`AccessFailedCount`, `a`.`ConcurrencyStamp`, `a`.`CreatedAt`, `a`.`Email`, `a`.`EmailConfirmed`, `a`.`FirstName`, `a`.`IsActive`, `a`.`LastName`, `a`.`LockoutEnabled`, `a`.`LockoutEnd`, `a`.`NormalizedEmail`, `a`.`NormalizedUserName`, `a`.`PasswordHash`, `a`.`PhoneNumber`, `a`.`PhoneNumberConfirmed`, `a`.`Role`, `a`.`SecurityStamp`, `a`.`TwoFactorEnabled`, `a`.`UserName`, `t0`.`Id`, `t0`.`CreatedAt`, `t0`.`DateOfBirth`, `t0`.`FaceIdToken`, `t0`.`FirstName`, `t0`.`GroupId`, `t0`.`IsDeleted`, `t0`.`LastName`, `t0`.`MonthlyFee`, `t0`.`ParentEmail`, `t0`.`ParentFullName`, `t0`.`ParentPhone`, `t0`.`RegistrationDate`, `t0`.`ScheduleType`, `t0`.`Status`, `t0`.`UpdatedAt`
FROM `groups` AS `g`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `d`.`Id`, `d`.`CreatedAt`, `d`.`Description`, `d`.`IsDeleted`, `d`.`Language`, `d`.`Name`, `d`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `divisions` AS `d`
    WHERE NOT (`d`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t` ON `g`.`DivisionId` = `t`.`Id`
INNER JOIN `AspNetUsers` AS `a` ON `g`.`TeacherId` = `a`.`Id`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `c`.`Id`, `c`.`CreatedAt`, `c`.`DateOfBirth`, `c`.`FaceIdToken`, `c`.`FirstName`, `c`.`GroupId`, `c`.`IsDeleted`, `c`.`LastName`, `c`.`MonthlyFee`, `c`.`ParentEmail`, `c`.`ParentFullName`, `c`.`ParentPhone`, `c`.`RegistrationDate`, `c`.`ScheduleType`, `c`.`Status`, `c`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `children` AS `c`
    WHERE NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`) AND NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t0` ON `g`.`Id` = `t0`.`GroupId`
WHERE NOT (`g`.`IsDeleted`)
ORDER BY `g`.`Id`, `t`.`Id`, `a`.`Id`

FROM `groups` AS `g`

    WHERE NOT (`d`.`IsDeleted`)

INNER JOIN `AspNetUsers` AS `a` ON `g`.`TeacherId` = `a`.`Id`

    WHERE NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`) AND NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t0` ON `g`.`Id` = `t0`.`GroupId`
WHERE NOT (`g`.`IsDeleted`)
ORDER BY `g`.`Id`, `t`.`Id`, `a`.`Id`

) AS `t0` ON `g`.`Id` = `t0`.`GroupId`
WHERE NOT (`g`.`IsDeleted`)

    WHERE NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`) AND NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t0` ON `g`.`Id` = `t0`.`GroupId`
WHERE NOT (`g`.`IsDeleted`)
ORDER BY `g`.`Id`, `t`.`Id`, `a`.`Id`

SELECT `g`.`Id`, `g`.`AgeCategory`, `g`.`CreatedAt`, `g`.`DivisionId`, `g`.`IsDeleted`, `g`.`Language`, `g`.`MaxChildCount`, `g`.`Name`, `g`.`TeacherId`, `g`.`UpdatedAt`, `t`.`Id`, `t`.`CreatedAt`, `t`.`Description`, `t`.`IsDeleted`, `t`.`Language`, `t`.`Name`, `t`.`UpdatedAt`, `a`.`Id`, `a`.`AccessFailedCount`, `a`.`ConcurrencyStamp`, `a`.`CreatedAt`, `a`.`Email`, `a`.`EmailConfirmed`, `a`.`FirstName`, `a`.`IsActive`, `a`.`LastName`, `a`.`LockoutEnabled`, `a`.`LockoutEnd`, `a`.`NormalizedEmail`, `a`.`NormalizedUserName`, `a`.`PasswordHash`, `a`.`PhoneNumber`, `a`.`PhoneNumberConfirmed`, `a`.`Role`, `a`.`SecurityStamp`, `a`.`TwoFactorEnabled`, `a`.`UserName`, `t0`.`Id`, `t0`.`CreatedAt`, `t0`.`DateOfBirth`, `t0`.`FaceIdToken`, `t0`.`FirstName`, `t0`.`GroupId`, `t0`.`IsDeleted`, `t0`.`LastName`, `t0`.`MonthlyFee`, `t0`.`ParentEmail`, `t0`.`ParentFullName`, `t0`.`ParentPhone`, `t0`.`RegistrationDate`, `t0`.`ScheduleType`, `t0`.`Status`, `t0`.`UpdatedAt`
FROM `groups` AS `g`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `d`.`Id`, `d`.`CreatedAt`, `d`.`Description`, `d`.`IsDeleted`, `d`.`Language`, `d`.`Name`, `d`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `divisions` AS `d`
    WHERE NOT (`d`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t` ON `g`.`DivisionId` = `t`.`Id`
INNER JOIN `AspNetUsers` AS `a` ON `g`.`TeacherId` = `a`.`Id`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `c`.`Id`, `c`.`CreatedAt`, `c`.`DateOfBirth`, `c`.`FaceIdToken`, `c`.`FirstName`, `c`.`GroupId`, `c`.`IsDeleted`, `c`.`LastName`, `c`.`MonthlyFee`, `c`.`ParentEmail`, `c`.`ParentFullName`, `c`.`ParentPhone`, `c`.`RegistrationDate`, `c`.`ScheduleType`, `c`.`Status`, `c`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `children` AS `c`
    WHERE NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`) AND NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t0` ON `g`.`Id` = `t0`.`GroupId`
WHERE NOT (`g`.`IsDeleted`)
ORDER BY `g`.`Id`, `t`.`Id`, `a`.`Id`

    WHERE NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t` ON `p`.`ChildId` = `t`.`Id`
INNER JOIN (

    WHERE NOT (`g`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t0` ON `t`.`GroupId` = `t0`.`Id`

    FROM `divisions` AS `d`
    WHERE NOT (`d`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t1` ON `t0`.`DivisionId` = `t1`.`Id`

    WHERE NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t` ON `p`.`ChildId` = `t`.`Id`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `g`.`Id`, `g`.`AgeCategory`, `g`.`CreatedAt`, `g`.`DivisionId`, `g`.`IsDeleted`, `g`.`Language`, `g`.`MaxChildCount`, `g`.`Name`, `g`.`TeacherId`, `g`.`UpdatedAt`

    WHERE NOT (`g`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t0` ON `t`.`GroupId` = `t0`.`Id`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `d`.`Id`, `d`.`CreatedAt`, `d`.`Description`, `d`.`IsDeleted`, `d`.`Language`, `d`.`Name`, `d`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `divisions` AS `d`
    WHERE NOT (`d`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t1` ON `t0`.`DivisionId` = `t1`.`Id`
WHERE NOT (`p`.`IsDeleted`) AND `p`.`Status` IN (2, 1)
ORDER BY `p`.`Year` DESC, `p`.`Month` DESC

    FROM `divisions` AS `d`
    WHERE NOT (`d`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t` ON `g`.`DivisionId` = `t`.`Id`
INNER JOIN `AspNetUsers` AS `a` ON `g`.`TeacherId` = `a`.`Id`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `c`.`Id`, `c`.`CreatedAt`, `c`.`DateOfBirth`, `c`.`FaceIdToken`, `c`.`FirstName`, `c`.`GroupId`, `c`.`IsDeleted`, `c`.`LastName`, `c`.`MonthlyFee`, `c`.`ParentEmail`, `c`.`ParentFullName`, `c`.`ParentPhone`, `c`.`RegistrationDate`, `c`.`ScheduleType`, `c`.`Status`, `c`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `children` AS `c`
    WHERE NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`) AND NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t0` ON `g`.`Id` = `t0`.`GroupId`
WHERE NOT (`g`.`IsDeleted`)
ORDER BY `g`.`Id`, `t`.`Id`, `a`.`Id`

SELECT `d`.`Id`, `d`.`CreatedAt`, `d`.`Description`, `d`.`IsDeleted`, `d`.`Language`, `d`.`Name`, `d`.`UpdatedAt`, `t`.`Id`, `t`.`AgeCategory`, `t`.`CreatedAt`, `t`.`DivisionId`, `t`.`IsDeleted`, `t`.`Language`, `t`.`MaxChildCount`, `t`.`Name`, `t`.`TeacherId`, `t`.`UpdatedAt`
FROM `divisions` AS `d`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `g`.`Id`, `g`.`AgeCategory`, `g`.`CreatedAt`, `g`.`DivisionId`, `g`.`IsDeleted`, `g`.`Language`, `g`.`MaxChildCount`, `g`.`Name`, `g`.`TeacherId`, `g`.`UpdatedAt`

    WHERE NOT (`g`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t` ON `d`.`Id` = `t`.`DivisionId`
WHERE NOT (`d`.`IsDeleted`)
ORDER BY `d`.`Id`

SELECT `p`.`Id`, `p`.`ChildId`, `p`.`CreatedAt`, `p`.`DiscountType`, `p`.`DiscountValue`, `p`.`FinalAmount`, `p`.`IsDeleted`, `p`.`Month`, `p`.`Notes`, `p`.`OriginalAmount`, `p`.`PaidAmount`, `p`.`PaymentDate`, `p`.`RecordedById`, `p`.`Status`, `p`.`UpdatedAt`, `p`.`Year`, `t`.`Id`, `t`.`CreatedAt`, `t`.`DateOfBirth`, `t`.`FaceIdToken`, `t`.`FirstName`, `t`.`GroupId`, `t`.`IsDeleted`, `t`.`LastName`, `t`.`MonthlyFee`, `t`.`ParentEmail`, `t`.`ParentFullName`, `t`.`ParentPhone`, `t`.`RegistrationDate`, `t`.`ScheduleType`, `t`.`Status`, `t`.`UpdatedAt`, `t0`.`Id`, `t0`.`AgeCategory`, `t0`.`CreatedAt`, `t0`.`DivisionId`, `t0`.`IsDeleted`, `t0`.`Language`, `t0`.`MaxChildCount`, `t0`.`Name`, `t0`.`TeacherId`, `t0`.`UpdatedAt`, `t1`.`Id`, `t1`.`CreatedAt`, `t1`.`Description`, `t1`.`IsDeleted`, `t1`.`Language`, `t1`.`Name`, `t1`.`UpdatedAt`
FROM `payments` AS `p`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `c`.`Id`, `c`.`CreatedAt`, `c`.`DateOfBirth`, `c`.`FaceIdToken`, `c`.`FirstName`, `c`.`GroupId`, `c`.`IsDeleted`, `c`.`LastName`, `c`.`MonthlyFee`, `c`.`ParentEmail`, `c`.`ParentFullName`, `c`.`ParentPhone`, `c`.`RegistrationDate`, `c`.`ScheduleType`, `c`.`Status`, `c`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `children` AS `c`
    WHERE NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t` ON `p`.`ChildId` = `t`.`Id`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `g`.`Id`, `g`.`AgeCategory`, `g`.`CreatedAt`, `g`.`DivisionId`, `g`.`IsDeleted`, `g`.`Language`, `g`.`MaxChildCount`, `g`.`Name`, `g`.`TeacherId`, `g`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `groups` AS `g`
    WHERE NOT (`g`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t0` ON `t`.`GroupId` = `t0`.`Id`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `d`.`Id`, `d`.`CreatedAt`, `d`.`Description`, `d`.`IsDeleted`, `d`.`Language`, `d`.`Name`, `d`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `divisions` AS `d`
    WHERE NOT (`d`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t1` ON `t0`.`DivisionId` = `t1`.`Id`
WHERE NOT (`p`.`IsDeleted`) AND `p`.`Status` IN (2, 1)
ORDER BY `p`.`Year` DESC, `p`.`Month` DESC

FROM `payments` AS `p`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `c`.`Id`, `c`.`CreatedAt`, `c`.`DateOfBirth`, `c`.`FaceIdToken`, `c`.`FirstName`, `c`.`GroupId`, `c`.`IsDeleted`, `c`.`LastName`, `c`.`MonthlyFee`, `c`.`ParentEmail`, `c`.`ParentFullName`, `c`.`ParentPhone`, `c`.`RegistrationDate`, `c`.`ScheduleType`, `c`.`Status`, `c`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `children` AS `c`
    WHERE NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t` ON `p`.`ChildId` = `t`.`Id`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `g`.`Id`, `g`.`AgeCategory`, `g`.`CreatedAt`, `g`.`DivisionId`, `g`.`IsDeleted`, `g`.`Language`, `g`.`MaxChildCount`, `g`.`Name`, `g`.`TeacherId`, `g`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `groups` AS `g`
    WHERE NOT (`g`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t0` ON `t`.`GroupId` = `t0`.`Id`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `d`.`Id`, `d`.`CreatedAt`, `d`.`Description`, `d`.`IsDeleted`, `d`.`Language`, `d`.`Name`, `d`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `divisions` AS `d`
    WHERE NOT (`d`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t1` ON `t0`.`DivisionId` = `t1`.`Id`
WHERE NOT (`p`.`IsDeleted`) AND `p`.`Status` IN (2, 1)
ORDER BY `p`.`Year` DESC, `p`.`Month` DESC

FROM `payments` AS `p`

    SELECT `g`.`Id`, `g`.`AgeCategory`, `g`.`CreatedAt`, `g`.`DivisionId`, `g`.`IsDeleted`, `g`.`Language`, `g`.`MaxChildCount`, `g`.`Name`, `g`.`TeacherId`, `g`.`UpdatedAt`

    WHERE NOT (`d`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t1` ON `t0`.`DivisionId` = `t1`.`Id`

INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `c`.`Id`, `c`.`CreatedAt`, `c`.`DateOfBirth`, `c`.`FaceIdToken`, `c`.`FirstName`, `c`.`GroupId`, `c`.`IsDeleted`, `c`.`LastName`, `c`.`MonthlyFee`, `c`.`ParentEmail`, `c`.`ParentFullName`, `c`.`ParentPhone`, `c`.`RegistrationDate`, `c`.`ScheduleType`, `c`.`Status`, `c`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `children` AS `c`
    WHERE NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t` ON `p`.`ChildId` = `t`.`Id`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `g`.`Id`, `g`.`AgeCategory`, `g`.`CreatedAt`, `g`.`DivisionId`, `g`.`IsDeleted`, `g`.`Language`, `g`.`MaxChildCount`, `g`.`Name`, `g`.`TeacherId`, `g`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `groups` AS `g`
    WHERE NOT (`g`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t0` ON `t`.`GroupId` = `t0`.`Id`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `d`.`Id`, `d`.`CreatedAt`, `d`.`Description`, `d`.`IsDeleted`, `d`.`Language`, `d`.`Name`, `d`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `divisions` AS `d`
    WHERE NOT (`d`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t1` ON `t0`.`DivisionId` = `t1`.`Id`
WHERE NOT (`p`.`IsDeleted`) AND `p`.`Status` IN (2, 1)
ORDER BY `p`.`Year` DESC, `p`.`Month` DESC

SELECT `p`.`Id`, `p`.`ChildId`, `p`.`CreatedAt`, `p`.`DiscountType`, `p`.`DiscountValue`, `p`.`FinalAmount`, `p`.`IsDeleted`, `p`.`Month`, `p`.`Notes`, `p`.`OriginalAmount`, `p`.`PaidAmount`, `p`.`PaymentDate`, `p`.`RecordedById`, `p`.`Status`, `p`.`UpdatedAt`, `p`.`Year`, `t`.`Id`, `t`.`CreatedAt`, `t`.`DateOfBirth`, `t`.`FaceIdToken`, `t`.`FirstName`, `t`.`GroupId`, `t`.`IsDeleted`, `t`.`LastName`, `t`.`MonthlyFee`, `t`.`ParentEmail`, `t`.`ParentFullName`, `t`.`ParentPhone`, `t`.`RegistrationDate`, `t`.`ScheduleType`, `t`.`Status`, `t`.`UpdatedAt`, `t0`.`Id`, `t0`.`AgeCategory`, `t0`.`CreatedAt`, `t0`.`DivisionId`, `t0`.`IsDeleted`, `t0`.`Language`, `t0`.`MaxChildCount`, `t0`.`Name`, `t0`.`TeacherId`, `t0`.`UpdatedAt`, `t1`.`Id`, `t1`.`CreatedAt`, `t1`.`Description`, `t1`.`IsDeleted`, `t1`.`Language`, `t1`.`Name`, `t1`.`UpdatedAt`
FROM `payments` AS `p`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `c`.`Id`, `c`.`CreatedAt`, `c`.`DateOfBirth`, `c`.`FaceIdToken`, `c`.`FirstName`, `c`.`GroupId`, `c`.`IsDeleted`, `c`.`LastName`, `c`.`MonthlyFee`, `c`.`ParentEmail`, `c`.`ParentFullName`, `c`.`ParentPhone`, `c`.`RegistrationDate`, `c`.`ScheduleType`, `c`.`Status`, `c`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `children` AS `c`
    WHERE NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t` ON `p`.`ChildId` = `t`.`Id`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `g`.`Id`, `g`.`AgeCategory`, `g`.`CreatedAt`, `g`.`DivisionId`, `g`.`IsDeleted`, `g`.`Language`, `g`.`MaxChildCount`, `g`.`Name`, `g`.`TeacherId`, `g`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `groups` AS `g`
    WHERE NOT (`g`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t0` ON `t`.`GroupId` = `t0`.`Id`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `d`.`Id`, `d`.`CreatedAt`, `d`.`Description`, `d`.`IsDeleted`, `d`.`Language`, `d`.`Name`, `d`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `divisions` AS `d`
    WHERE NOT (`d`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t1` ON `t0`.`DivisionId` = `t1`.`Id`
WHERE NOT (`p`.`IsDeleted`) AND `p`.`Status` IN (2, 1)
ORDER BY `p`.`Year` DESC, `p`.`Month` DESC

    SELECT `c`.`Id`, `c`.`CreatedAt`, `c`.`DateOfBirth`, `c`.`FaceIdToken`, `c`.`FirstName`, `c`.`GroupId`, `c`.`IsDeleted`, `c`.`LastName`, `c`.`MonthlyFee`, `c`.`ParentEmail`, `c`.`ParentFullName`, `c`.`ParentPhone`, `c`.`RegistrationDate`, `c`.`ScheduleType`, `c`.`Status`, `c`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `children` AS `c`
    WHERE NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t` ON `p`.`ChildId` = `t`.`Id`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `g`.`Id`, `g`.`AgeCategory`, `g`.`CreatedAt`, `g`.`DivisionId`, `g`.`IsDeleted`, `g`.`Language`, `g`.`MaxChildCount`, `g`.`Name`, `g`.`TeacherId`, `g`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `groups` AS `g`
    WHERE NOT (`g`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t0` ON `t`.`GroupId` = `t0`.`Id`
INNER JOIN (

    FROM `divisions` AS `d`
    WHERE NOT (`d`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t1` ON `t0`.`DivisionId` = `t1`.`Id`

    SELECT `g`.`Id`, `g`.`AgeCategory`, `g`.`CreatedAt`, `g`.`DivisionId`, `g`.`IsDeleted`, `g`.`Language`, `g`.`MaxChildCount`, `g`.`Name`, `g`.`TeacherId`, `g`.`UpdatedAt`

FROM `payments` AS `p`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `c`.`Id`, `c`.`CreatedAt`, `c`.`DateOfBirth`, `c`.`FaceIdToken`, `c`.`FirstName`, `c`.`GroupId`, `c`.`IsDeleted`, `c`.`LastName`, `c`.`MonthlyFee`, `c`.`ParentEmail`, `c`.`ParentFullName`, `c`.`ParentPhone`, `c`.`RegistrationDate`, `c`.`ScheduleType`, `c`.`Status`, `c`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `children` AS `c`
    WHERE NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t` ON `p`.`ChildId` = `t`.`Id`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `g`.`Id`, `g`.`AgeCategory`, `g`.`CreatedAt`, `g`.`DivisionId`, `g`.`IsDeleted`, `g`.`Language`, `g`.`MaxChildCount`, `g`.`Name`, `g`.`TeacherId`, `g`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `groups` AS `g`
    WHERE NOT (`g`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t0` ON `t`.`GroupId` = `t0`.`Id`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `d`.`Id`, `d`.`CreatedAt`, `d`.`Description`, `d`.`IsDeleted`, `d`.`Language`, `d`.`Name`, `d`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `divisions` AS `d`
    WHERE NOT (`d`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t1` ON `t0`.`DivisionId` = `t1`.`Id`
WHERE NOT (`p`.`IsDeleted`) AND `p`.`Status` IN (2, 1)
ORDER BY `p`.`Year` DESC, `p`.`Month` DESC

    SELECT `c`.`Id`, `c`.`CreatedAt`, `c`.`DateOfBirth`, `c`.`FaceIdToken`, `c`.`FirstName`, `c`.`GroupId`, `c`.`IsDeleted`, `c`.`LastName`, `c`.`MonthlyFee`, `c`.`ParentEmail`, `c`.`ParentFullName`, `c`.`ParentPhone`, `c`.`RegistrationDate`, `c`.`ScheduleType`, `c`.`Status`, `c`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `children` AS `c`
    WHERE NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t` ON `p`.`ChildId` = `t`.`Id`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `g`.`Id`, `g`.`AgeCategory`, `g`.`CreatedAt`, `g`.`DivisionId`, `g`.`IsDeleted`, `g`.`Language`, `g`.`MaxChildCount`, `g`.`Name`, `g`.`TeacherId`, `g`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `groups` AS `g`
    WHERE NOT (`g`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t0` ON `t`.`GroupId` = `t0`.`Id`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `d`.`Id`, `d`.`CreatedAt`, `d`.`Description`, `d`.`IsDeleted`, `d`.`Language`, `d`.`Name`, `d`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `divisions` AS `d`
    WHERE NOT (`d`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t1` ON `t0`.`DivisionId` = `t1`.`Id`
WHERE NOT (`p`.`IsDeleted`) AND `p`.`Status` IN (2, 1)
ORDER BY `p`.`Year` DESC, `p`.`Month` DESC

FROM `payments` AS `p`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `c`.`Id`, `c`.`CreatedAt`, `c`.`DateOfBirth`, `c`.`FaceIdToken`, `c`.`FirstName`, `c`.`GroupId`, `c`.`IsDeleted`, `c`.`LastName`, `c`.`MonthlyFee`, `c`.`ParentEmail`, `c`.`ParentFullName`, `c`.`ParentPhone`, `c`.`RegistrationDate`, `c`.`ScheduleType`, `c`.`Status`, `c`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `children` AS `c`
    WHERE NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t` ON `p`.`ChildId` = `t`.`Id`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `g`.`Id`, `g`.`AgeCategory`, `g`.`CreatedAt`, `g`.`DivisionId`, `g`.`IsDeleted`, `g`.`Language`, `g`.`MaxChildCount`, `g`.`Name`, `g`.`TeacherId`, `g`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `groups` AS `g`
    WHERE NOT (`g`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t0` ON `t`.`GroupId` = `t0`.`Id`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `d`.`Id`, `d`.`CreatedAt`, `d`.`Description`, `d`.`IsDeleted`, `d`.`Language`, `d`.`Name`, `d`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `divisions` AS `d`
    WHERE NOT (`d`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t1` ON `t0`.`DivisionId` = `t1`.`Id`
WHERE NOT (`p`.`IsDeleted`) AND `p`.`Status` IN (2, 1)
ORDER BY `p`.`Year` DESC, `p`.`Month` DESC

SELECT `a`.`Id`, `a`.`ArrivalTime`, `a`.`ChildId`, `a`.`CreatedAt`, `a`.`Date`, `a`.`DepartureTime`, `a`.`IsDeleted`, `a`.`IsEarlyLeave`, `a`.`IsLate`, `a`.`IsPresent`, `a`.`Notes`, `a`.`RecordedById`, `a`.`UpdatedAt`, `t`.`Id`, `t`.`CreatedAt`, `t`.`DateOfBirth`, `t`.`FaceIdToken`, `t`.`FirstName`, `t`.`GroupId`, `t`.`IsDeleted`, `t`.`LastName`, `t`.`MonthlyFee`, `t`.`ParentEmail`, `t`.`ParentFullName`, `t`.`ParentPhone`, `t`.`RegistrationDate`, `t`.`ScheduleType`, `t`.`Status`, `t`.`UpdatedAt`, `t0`.`Id`, `t0`.`AgeCategory`, `t0`.`CreatedAt`, `t0`.`DivisionId`, `t0`.`IsDeleted`, `t0`.`Language`, `t0`.`MaxChildCount`, `t0`.`Name`, `t0`.`TeacherId`, `t0`.`UpdatedAt`, `a0`.`Id`, `a0`.`AccessFailedCount`, `a0`.`ConcurrencyStamp`, `a0`.`CreatedAt`, `a0`.`Email`, `a0`.`EmailConfirmed`, `a0`.`FirstName`, `a0`.`IsActive`, `a0`.`LastName`, `a0`.`LockoutEnabled`, `a0`.`LockoutEnd`, `a0`.`NormalizedEmail`, `a0`.`NormalizedUserName`, `a0`.`PasswordHash`, `a0`.`PhoneNumber`, `a0`.`PhoneNumberConfirmed`, `a0`.`Role`, `a0`.`SecurityStamp`, `a0`.`TwoFactorEnabled`, `a0`.`UserName`
FROM `attendances` AS `a`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `c`.`Id`, `c`.`CreatedAt`, `c`.`DateOfBirth`, `c`.`FaceIdToken`, `c`.`FirstName`, `c`.`GroupId`, `c`.`IsDeleted`, `c`.`LastName`, `c`.`MonthlyFee`, `c`.`ParentEmail`, `c`.`ParentFullName`, `c`.`ParentPhone`, `c`.`RegistrationDate`, `c`.`ScheduleType`, `c`.`Status`, `c`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `children` AS `c`
    WHERE NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t` ON `a`.`ChildId` = `t`.`Id`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `g`.`Id`, `g`.`AgeCategory`, `g`.`CreatedAt`, `g`.`DivisionId`, `g`.`IsDeleted`, `g`.`Language`, `g`.`MaxChildCount`, `g`.`Name`, `g`.`TeacherId`, `g`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `groups` AS `g`
    WHERE NOT (`g`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t0` ON `t`.`GroupId` = `t0`.`Id`
INNER JOIN `AspNetUsers` AS `a0` ON `a`.`RecordedById` = `a0`.`Id`
WHERE NOT (`a`.`IsDeleted`) AND (`a`.`Date` = @__date_0)

FROM `groups` AS `g`

) AS `t0` ON `g`.`Id` = `t0`.`GroupId`
WHERE NOT (`g`.`IsDeleted`)
ORDER BY `g`.`Id`, `t`.`Id`, `a`.`Id`

SELECT `g`.`Id`, `g`.`AgeCategory`, `g`.`CreatedAt`, `g`.`DivisionId`, `g`.`IsDeleted`, `g`.`Language`, `g`.`MaxChildCount`, `g`.`Name`, `g`.`TeacherId`, `g`.`UpdatedAt`, `t`.`Id`, `t`.`CreatedAt`, `t`.`Description`, `t`.`IsDeleted`, `t`.`Language`, `t`.`Name`, `t`.`UpdatedAt`, `a`.`Id`, `a`.`AccessFailedCount`, `a`.`ConcurrencyStamp`, `a`.`CreatedAt`, `a`.`Email`, `a`.`EmailConfirmed`, `a`.`FirstName`, `a`.`IsActive`, `a`.`LastName`, `a`.`LockoutEnabled`, `a`.`LockoutEnd`, `a`.`NormalizedEmail`, `a`.`NormalizedUserName`, `a`.`PasswordHash`, `a`.`PhoneNumber`, `a`.`PhoneNumberConfirmed`, `a`.`Role`, `a`.`SecurityStamp`, `a`.`TwoFactorEnabled`, `a`.`UserName`, `t0`.`Id`, `t0`.`CreatedAt`, `t0`.`DateOfBirth`, `t0`.`FaceIdToken`, `t0`.`FirstName`, `t0`.`GroupId`, `t0`.`IsDeleted`, `t0`.`LastName`, `t0`.`MonthlyFee`, `t0`.`ParentEmail`, `t0`.`ParentFullName`, `t0`.`ParentPhone`, `t0`.`RegistrationDate`, `t0`.`ScheduleType`, `t0`.`Status`, `t0`.`UpdatedAt`
FROM `groups` AS `g`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `d`.`Id`, `d`.`CreatedAt`, `d`.`Description`, `d`.`IsDeleted`, `d`.`Language`, `d`.`Name`, `d`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `divisions` AS `d`
    WHERE NOT (`d`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t` ON `g`.`DivisionId` = `t`.`Id`
INNER JOIN `AspNetUsers` AS `a` ON `g`.`TeacherId` = `a`.`Id`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `c`.`Id`, `c`.`CreatedAt`, `c`.`DateOfBirth`, `c`.`FaceIdToken`, `c`.`FirstName`, `c`.`GroupId`, `c`.`IsDeleted`, `c`.`LastName`, `c`.`MonthlyFee`, `c`.`ParentEmail`, `c`.`ParentFullName`, `c`.`ParentPhone`, `c`.`RegistrationDate`, `c`.`ScheduleType`, `c`.`Status`, `c`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `children` AS `c`
    WHERE NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`) AND NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t0` ON `g`.`Id` = `t0`.`GroupId`
WHERE NOT (`g`.`IsDeleted`)
ORDER BY `g`.`Id`, `t`.`Id`, `a`.`Id`

WHERE NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`)

SELECT `a`.`Id`, `a`.`ArrivalTime`, `a`.`ChildId`, `a`.`CreatedAt`, `a`.`Date`, `a`.`DepartureTime`, `a`.`IsDeleted`, `a`.`IsEarlyLeave`, `a`.`IsLate`, `a`.`IsPresent`, `a`.`Notes`, `a`.`RecordedById`, `a`.`UpdatedAt`, `t`.`Id`, `t`.`CreatedAt`, `t`.`DateOfBirth`, `t`.`FaceIdToken`, `t`.`FirstName`, `t`.`GroupId`, `t`.`IsDeleted`, `t`.`LastName`, `t`.`MonthlyFee`, `t`.`ParentEmail`, `t`.`ParentFullName`, `t`.`ParentPhone`, `t`.`RegistrationDate`, `t`.`ScheduleType`, `t`.`Status`, `t`.`UpdatedAt`, `t0`.`Id`, `t0`.`AgeCategory`, `t0`.`CreatedAt`, `t0`.`DivisionId`, `t0`.`IsDeleted`, `t0`.`Language`, `t0`.`MaxChildCount`, `t0`.`Name`, `t0`.`TeacherId`, `t0`.`UpdatedAt`, `a0`.`Id`, `a0`.`AccessFailedCount`, `a0`.`ConcurrencyStamp`, `a0`.`CreatedAt`, `a0`.`Email`, `a0`.`EmailConfirmed`, `a0`.`FirstName`, `a0`.`IsActive`, `a0`.`LastName`, `a0`.`LockoutEnabled`, `a0`.`LockoutEnd`, `a0`.`NormalizedEmail`, `a0`.`NormalizedUserName`, `a0`.`PasswordHash`, `a0`.`PhoneNumber`, `a0`.`PhoneNumberConfirmed`, `a0`.`Role`, `a0`.`SecurityStamp`, `a0`.`TwoFactorEnabled`, `a0`.`UserName`
FROM `attendances` AS `a`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `c`.`Id`, `c`.`CreatedAt`, `c`.`DateOfBirth`, `c`.`FaceIdToken`, `c`.`FirstName`, `c`.`GroupId`, `c`.`IsDeleted`, `c`.`LastName`, `c`.`MonthlyFee`, `c`.`ParentEmail`, `c`.`ParentFullName`, `c`.`ParentPhone`, `c`.`RegistrationDate`, `c`.`ScheduleType`, `c`.`Status`, `c`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `children` AS `c`
    WHERE NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t` ON `a`.`ChildId` = `t`.`Id`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `g`.`Id`, `g`.`AgeCategory`, `g`.`CreatedAt`, `g`.`DivisionId`, `g`.`IsDeleted`, `g`.`Language`, `g`.`MaxChildCount`, `g`.`Name`, `g`.`TeacherId`, `g`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `groups` AS `g`
    WHERE NOT (`g`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t0` ON `t`.`GroupId` = `t0`.`Id`
INNER JOIN `AspNetUsers` AS `a0` ON `a`.`RecordedById` = `a0`.`Id`
WHERE NOT (`a`.`IsDeleted`) AND (`a`.`Date` = @__date_0)

SELECT `g`.`Id`, `g`.`AgeCategory`, `g`.`CreatedAt`, `g`.`DivisionId`, `g`.`IsDeleted`, `g`.`Language`, `g`.`MaxChildCount`, `g`.`Name`, `g`.`TeacherId`, `g`.`UpdatedAt`, `t`.`Id`, `t`.`CreatedAt`, `t`.`Description`, `t`.`IsDeleted`, `t`.`Language`, `t`.`Name`, `t`.`UpdatedAt`, `a`.`Id`, `a`.`AccessFailedCount`, `a`.`ConcurrencyStamp`, `a`.`CreatedAt`, `a`.`Email`, `a`.`EmailConfirmed`, `a`.`FirstName`, `a`.`IsActive`, `a`.`LastName`, `a`.`LockoutEnabled`, `a`.`LockoutEnd`, `a`.`NormalizedEmail`, `a`.`NormalizedUserName`, `a`.`PasswordHash`, `a`.`PhoneNumber`, `a`.`PhoneNumberConfirmed`, `a`.`Role`, `a`.`SecurityStamp`, `a`.`TwoFactorEnabled`, `a`.`UserName`, `t0`.`Id`, `t0`.`CreatedAt`, `t0`.`DateOfBirth`, `t0`.`FaceIdToken`, `t0`.`FirstName`, `t0`.`GroupId`, `t0`.`IsDeleted`, `t0`.`LastName`, `t0`.`MonthlyFee`, `t0`.`ParentEmail`, `t0`.`ParentFullName`, `t0`.`ParentPhone`, `t0`.`RegistrationDate`, `t0`.`ScheduleType`, `t0`.`Status`, `t0`.`UpdatedAt`
FROM `groups` AS `g`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `d`.`Id`, `d`.`CreatedAt`, `d`.`Description`, `d`.`IsDeleted`, `d`.`Language`, `d`.`Name`, `d`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `divisions` AS `d`
    WHERE NOT (`d`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t` ON `g`.`DivisionId` = `t`.`Id`
INNER JOIN `AspNetUsers` AS `a` ON `g`.`TeacherId` = `a`.`Id`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `c`.`Id`, `c`.`CreatedAt`, `c`.`DateOfBirth`, `c`.`FaceIdToken`, `c`.`FirstName`, `c`.`GroupId`, `c`.`IsDeleted`, `c`.`LastName`, `c`.`MonthlyFee`, `c`.`ParentEmail`, `c`.`ParentFullName`, `c`.`ParentPhone`, `c`.`RegistrationDate`, `c`.`ScheduleType`, `c`.`Status`, `c`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `children` AS `c`
    WHERE NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`) AND NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t0` ON `g`.`Id` = `t0`.`GroupId`
WHERE NOT (`g`.`IsDeleted`)
ORDER BY `g`.`Id`, `t`.`Id`, `a`.`Id`

FROM `groups` AS `g`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `d`.`Id`, `d`.`CreatedAt`, `d`.`Description`, `d`.`IsDeleted`, `d`.`Language`, `d`.`Name`, `d`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `divisions` AS `d`
    WHERE NOT (`d`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t` ON `g`.`DivisionId` = `t`.`Id`
INNER JOIN `AspNetUsers` AS `a` ON `g`.`TeacherId` = `a`.`Id`

    WHERE NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`) AND NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t0` ON `g`.`Id` = `t0`.`GroupId`
WHERE NOT (`g`.`IsDeleted`)
ORDER BY `g`.`Id`, `t`.`Id`, `a`.`Id`

SELECT `g`.`Id`, `g`.`AgeCategory`, `g`.`CreatedAt`, `g`.`DivisionId`, `g`.`IsDeleted`, `g`.`Language`, `g`.`MaxChildCount`, `g`.`Name`, `g`.`TeacherId`, `g`.`UpdatedAt`, `t`.`Id`, `t`.`CreatedAt`, `t`.`Description`, `t`.`IsDeleted`, `t`.`Language`, `t`.`Name`, `t`.`UpdatedAt`, `a`.`Id`, `a`.`AccessFailedCount`, `a`.`ConcurrencyStamp`, `a`.`CreatedAt`, `a`.`Email`, `a`.`EmailConfirmed`, `a`.`FirstName`, `a`.`IsActive`, `a`.`LastName`, `a`.`LockoutEnabled`, `a`.`LockoutEnd`, `a`.`NormalizedEmail`, `a`.`NormalizedUserName`, `a`.`PasswordHash`, `a`.`PhoneNumber`, `a`.`PhoneNumberConfirmed`, `a`.`Role`, `a`.`SecurityStamp`, `a`.`TwoFactorEnabled`, `a`.`UserName`, `t0`.`Id`, `t0`.`CreatedAt`, `t0`.`DateOfBirth`, `t0`.`FaceIdToken`, `t0`.`FirstName`, `t0`.`GroupId`, `t0`.`IsDeleted`, `t0`.`LastName`, `t0`.`MonthlyFee`, `t0`.`ParentEmail`, `t0`.`ParentFullName`, `t0`.`ParentPhone`, `t0`.`RegistrationDate`, `t0`.`ScheduleType`, `t0`.`Status`, `t0`.`UpdatedAt`
FROM `groups` AS `g`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `d`.`Id`, `d`.`CreatedAt`, `d`.`Description`, `d`.`IsDeleted`, `d`.`Language`, `d`.`Name`, `d`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `divisions` AS `d`
    WHERE NOT (`d`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t` ON `g`.`DivisionId` = `t`.`Id`
INNER JOIN `AspNetUsers` AS `a` ON `g`.`TeacherId` = `a`.`Id`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `c`.`Id`, `c`.`CreatedAt`, `c`.`DateOfBirth`, `c`.`FaceIdToken`, `c`.`FirstName`, `c`.`GroupId`, `c`.`IsDeleted`, `c`.`LastName`, `c`.`MonthlyFee`, `c`.`ParentEmail`, `c`.`ParentFullName`, `c`.`ParentPhone`, `c`.`RegistrationDate`, `c`.`ScheduleType`, `c`.`Status`, `c`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `children` AS `c`
    WHERE NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`) AND NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t0` ON `g`.`Id` = `t0`.`GroupId`
WHERE NOT (`g`.`IsDeleted`)
ORDER BY `g`.`Id`, `t`.`Id`, `a`.`Id`

SELECT `d`.`Id`, `d`.`CreatedAt`, `d`.`Description`, `d`.`IsDeleted`, `d`.`Language`, `d`.`Name`, `d`.`UpdatedAt`, `t`.`Id`, `t`.`AgeCategory`, `t`.`CreatedAt`, `t`.`DivisionId`, `t`.`IsDeleted`, `t`.`Language`, `t`.`MaxChildCount`, `t`.`Name`, `t`.`TeacherId`, `t`.`UpdatedAt`

LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `g`.`Id`, `g`.`AgeCategory`, `g`.`CreatedAt`, `g`.`DivisionId`, `g`.`IsDeleted`, `g`.`Language`, `g`.`MaxChildCount`, `g`.`Name`, `g`.`TeacherId`, `g`.`UpdatedAt`

SELECT `g`.`Id`, `g`.`AgeCategory`, `g`.`CreatedAt`, `g`.`DivisionId`, `g`.`IsDeleted`, `g`.`Language`, `g`.`MaxChildCount`, `g`.`Name`, `g`.`TeacherId`, `g`.`UpdatedAt`, `t`.`Id`, `t`.`CreatedAt`, `t`.`Description`, `t`.`IsDeleted`, `t`.`Language`, `t`.`Name`, `t`.`UpdatedAt`, `a`.`Id`, `a`.`AccessFailedCount`, `a`.`ConcurrencyStamp`, `a`.`CreatedAt`, `a`.`Email`, `a`.`EmailConfirmed`, `a`.`FirstName`, `a`.`IsActive`, `a`.`LastName`, `a`.`LockoutEnabled`, `a`.`LockoutEnd`, `a`.`NormalizedEmail`, `a`.`NormalizedUserName`, `a`.`PasswordHash`, `a`.`PhoneNumber`, `a`.`PhoneNumberConfirmed`, `a`.`Role`, `a`.`SecurityStamp`, `a`.`TwoFactorEnabled`, `a`.`UserName`, `t0`.`Id`, `t0`.`CreatedAt`, `t0`.`DateOfBirth`, `t0`.`FaceIdToken`, `t0`.`FirstName`, `t0`.`GroupId`, `t0`.`IsDeleted`, `t0`.`LastName`, `t0`.`MonthlyFee`, `t0`.`ParentEmail`, `t0`.`ParentFullName`, `t0`.`ParentPhone`, `t0`.`RegistrationDate`, `t0`.`ScheduleType`, `t0`.`Status`, `t0`.`UpdatedAt`
FROM `groups` AS `g`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `d`.`Id`, `d`.`CreatedAt`, `d`.`Description`, `d`.`IsDeleted`, `d`.`Language`, `d`.`Name`, `d`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `divisions` AS `d`
    WHERE NOT (`d`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t` ON `g`.`DivisionId` = `t`.`Id`
INNER JOIN `AspNetUsers` AS `a` ON `g`.`TeacherId` = `a`.`Id`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `c`.`Id`, `c`.`CreatedAt`, `c`.`DateOfBirth`, `c`.`FaceIdToken`, `c`.`FirstName`, `c`.`GroupId`, `c`.`IsDeleted`, `c`.`LastName`, `c`.`MonthlyFee`, `c`.`ParentEmail`, `c`.`ParentFullName`, `c`.`ParentPhone`, `c`.`RegistrationDate`, `c`.`ScheduleType`, `c`.`Status`, `c`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `children` AS `c`
    WHERE NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`) AND NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t0` ON `g`.`Id` = `t0`.`GroupId`
WHERE NOT (`g`.`IsDeleted`)
ORDER BY `g`.`Id`, `t`.`Id`, `a`.`Id`

) AS `t0` ON `g`.`Id` = `t0`.`GroupId`
WHERE NOT (`g`.`IsDeleted`)

FROM `groups` AS `g`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `d`.`Id`, `d`.`CreatedAt`, `d`.`Description`, `d`.`IsDeleted`, `d`.`Language`, `d`.`Name`, `d`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `divisions` AS `d`
    WHERE NOT (`d`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t` ON `g`.`DivisionId` = `t`.`Id`
INNER JOIN `AspNetUsers` AS `a` ON `g`.`TeacherId` = `a`.`Id`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `c`.`Id`, `c`.`CreatedAt`, `c`.`DateOfBirth`, `c`.`FaceIdToken`, `c`.`FirstName`, `c`.`GroupId`, `c`.`IsDeleted`, `c`.`LastName`, `c`.`MonthlyFee`, `c`.`ParentEmail`, `c`.`ParentFullName`, `c`.`ParentPhone`, `c`.`RegistrationDate`, `c`.`ScheduleType`, `c`.`Status`, `c`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `children` AS `c`
    WHERE NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`) AND NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t0` ON `g`.`Id` = `t0`.`GroupId`
WHERE NOT (`g`.`IsDeleted`)
ORDER BY `g`.`Id`, `t`.`Id`, `a`.`Id`

SELECT `g`.`Id`, `g`.`AgeCategory`, `g`.`CreatedAt`, `g`.`DivisionId`, `g`.`IsDeleted`, `g`.`Language`, `g`.`MaxChildCount`, `g`.`Name`, `g`.`TeacherId`, `g`.`UpdatedAt`, `t`.`Id`, `t`.`CreatedAt`, `t`.`Description`, `t`.`IsDeleted`, `t`.`Language`, `t`.`Name`, `t`.`UpdatedAt`, `a`.`Id`, `a`.`AccessFailedCount`, `a`.`ConcurrencyStamp`, `a`.`CreatedAt`, `a`.`Email`, `a`.`EmailConfirmed`, `a`.`FirstName`, `a`.`IsActive`, `a`.`LastName`, `a`.`LockoutEnabled`, `a`.`LockoutEnd`, `a`.`NormalizedEmail`, `a`.`NormalizedUserName`, `a`.`PasswordHash`, `a`.`PhoneNumber`, `a`.`PhoneNumberConfirmed`, `a`.`Role`, `a`.`SecurityStamp`, `a`.`TwoFactorEnabled`, `a`.`UserName`, `t0`.`Id`, `t0`.`CreatedAt`, `t0`.`DateOfBirth`, `t0`.`FaceIdToken`, `t0`.`FirstName`, `t0`.`GroupId`, `t0`.`IsDeleted`, `t0`.`LastName`, `t0`.`MonthlyFee`, `t0`.`ParentEmail`, `t0`.`ParentFullName`, `t0`.`ParentPhone`, `t0`.`RegistrationDate`, `t0`.`ScheduleType`, `t0`.`Status`, `t0`.`UpdatedAt`
FROM `groups` AS `g`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `d`.`Id`, `d`.`CreatedAt`, `d`.`Description`, `d`.`IsDeleted`, `d`.`Language`, `d`.`Name`, `d`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `divisions` AS `d`
    WHERE NOT (`d`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t` ON `g`.`DivisionId` = `t`.`Id`
INNER JOIN `AspNetUsers` AS `a` ON `g`.`TeacherId` = `a`.`Id`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `c`.`Id`, `c`.`CreatedAt`, `c`.`DateOfBirth`, `c`.`FaceIdToken`, `c`.`FirstName`, `c`.`GroupId`, `c`.`IsDeleted`, `c`.`LastName`, `c`.`MonthlyFee`, `c`.`ParentEmail`, `c`.`ParentFullName`, `c`.`ParentPhone`, `c`.`RegistrationDate`, `c`.`ScheduleType`, `c`.`Status`, `c`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `children` AS `c`
    WHERE NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`) AND NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t0` ON `g`.`Id` = `t0`.`GroupId`
WHERE NOT (`g`.`IsDeleted`)
ORDER BY `g`.`Id`, `t`.`Id`, `a`.`Id`

SELECT `d`.`Id`, `d`.`CreatedAt`, `d`.`Description`, `d`.`IsDeleted`, `d`.`Language`, `d`.`Name`, `d`.`UpdatedAt`, `t`.`Id`, `t`.`AgeCategory`, `t`.`CreatedAt`, `t`.`DivisionId`, `t`.`IsDeleted`, `t`.`Language`, `t`.`MaxChildCount`, `t`.`Name`, `t`.`TeacherId`, `t`.`UpdatedAt`
FROM `divisions` AS `d`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `g`.`Id`, `g`.`AgeCategory`, `g`.`CreatedAt`, `g`.`DivisionId`, `g`.`IsDeleted`, `g`.`Language`, `g`.`MaxChildCount`, `g`.`Name`, `g`.`TeacherId`, `g`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `groups` AS `g`
    WHERE NOT (`g`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t` ON `d`.`Id` = `t`.`DivisionId`
WHERE NOT (`d`.`IsDeleted`)

    FROM `divisions` AS `d`
    WHERE NOT (`d`.`IsDeleted`)

    FROM `children` AS `c`

) AS `t0` ON `g`.`Id` = `t0`.`GroupId`
WHERE NOT (`g`.`IsDeleted`)
ORDER BY `g`.`Id`, `t`.`Id`, `a`.`Id`

SELECT `d`.`Id`, `d`.`CreatedAt`, `d`.`Description`, `d`.`IsDeleted`, `d`.`Language`, `d`.`Name`, `d`.`UpdatedAt`, `t`.`Id`, `t`.`AgeCategory`, `t`.`CreatedAt`, `t`.`DivisionId`, `t`.`IsDeleted`, `t`.`Language`, `t`.`MaxChildCount`, `t`.`Name`, `t`.`TeacherId`, `t`.`UpdatedAt`
FROM `divisions` AS `d`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `g`.`Id`, `g`.`AgeCategory`, `g`.`CreatedAt`, `g`.`DivisionId`, `g`.`IsDeleted`, `g`.`Language`, `g`.`MaxChildCount`, `g`.`Name`, `g`.`TeacherId`, `g`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `groups` AS `g`
    WHERE NOT (`g`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t` ON `d`.`Id` = `t`.`DivisionId`
WHERE NOT (`d`.`IsDeleted`)
ORDER BY `d`.`Id`

SELECT `g`.`Id`, `g`.`AgeCategory`, `g`.`CreatedAt`, `g`.`DivisionId`, `g`.`IsDeleted`, `g`.`Language`, `g`.`MaxChildCount`, `g`.`Name`, `g`.`TeacherId`, `g`.`UpdatedAt`, `t`.`Id`, `t`.`CreatedAt`, `t`.`Description`, `t`.`IsDeleted`, `t`.`Language`, `t`.`Name`, `t`.`UpdatedAt`, `a`.`Id`, `a`.`AccessFailedCount`, `a`.`ConcurrencyStamp`, `a`.`CreatedAt`, `a`.`Email`, `a`.`EmailConfirmed`, `a`.`FirstName`, `a`.`IsActive`, `a`.`LastName`, `a`.`LockoutEnabled`, `a`.`LockoutEnd`, `a`.`NormalizedEmail`, `a`.`NormalizedUserName`, `a`.`PasswordHash`, `a`.`PhoneNumber`, `a`.`PhoneNumberConfirmed`, `a`.`Role`, `a`.`SecurityStamp`, `a`.`TwoFactorEnabled`, `a`.`UserName`, `t0`.`Id`, `t0`.`CreatedAt`, `t0`.`DateOfBirth`, `t0`.`FaceIdToken`, `t0`.`FirstName`, `t0`.`GroupId`, `t0`.`IsDeleted`, `t0`.`LastName`, `t0`.`MonthlyFee`, `t0`.`ParentEmail`, `t0`.`ParentFullName`, `t0`.`ParentPhone`, `t0`.`RegistrationDate`, `t0`.`ScheduleType`, `t0`.`Status`, `t0`.`UpdatedAt`
FROM `groups` AS `g`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `d`.`Id`, `d`.`CreatedAt`, `d`.`Description`, `d`.`IsDeleted`, `d`.`Language`, `d`.`Name`, `d`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `divisions` AS `d`
    WHERE NOT (`d`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t` ON `g`.`DivisionId` = `t`.`Id`
INNER JOIN `AspNetUsers` AS `a` ON `g`.`TeacherId` = `a`.`Id`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `c`.`Id`, `c`.`CreatedAt`, `c`.`DateOfBirth`, `c`.`FaceIdToken`, `c`.`FirstName`, `c`.`GroupId`, `c`.`IsDeleted`, `c`.`LastName`, `c`.`MonthlyFee`, `c`.`ParentEmail`, `c`.`ParentFullName`, `c`.`ParentPhone`, `c`.`RegistrationDate`, `c`.`ScheduleType`, `c`.`Status`, `c`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `children` AS `c`
    WHERE NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`) AND NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t0` ON `g`.`Id` = `t0`.`GroupId`
WHERE NOT (`g`.`IsDeleted`)
ORDER BY `g`.`Id`, `t`.`Id`, `a`.`Id`

FROM `attendances` AS `a`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `c`.`Id`, `c`.`CreatedAt`, `c`.`DateOfBirth`, `c`.`FaceIdToken`, `c`.`FirstName`, `c`.`GroupId`, `c`.`IsDeleted`, `c`.`LastName`, `c`.`MonthlyFee`, `c`.`ParentEmail`, `c`.`ParentFullName`, `c`.`ParentPhone`, `c`.`RegistrationDate`, `c`.`ScheduleType`, `c`.`Status`, `c`.`UpdatedAt`

    WHERE NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t` ON `a`.`ChildId` = `t`.`Id`
INNER JOIN (

) AS `t0` ON `t`.`GroupId` = `t0`.`Id`

SELECT `a`.`Id`, `a`.`ArrivalTime`, `a`.`ChildId`, `a`.`CreatedAt`, `a`.`Date`, `a`.`DepartureTime`, `a`.`IsDeleted`, `a`.`IsEarlyLeave`, `a`.`IsLate`, `a`.`IsPresent`, `a`.`Notes`, `a`.`RecordedById`, `a`.`UpdatedAt`, `t`.`Id`, `t`.`CreatedAt`, `t`.`DateOfBirth`, `t`.`FaceIdToken`, `t`.`FirstName`, `t`.`GroupId`, `t`.`IsDeleted`, `t`.`LastName`, `t`.`MonthlyFee`, `t`.`ParentEmail`, `t`.`ParentFullName`, `t`.`ParentPhone`, `t`.`RegistrationDate`, `t`.`ScheduleType`, `t`.`Status`, `t`.`UpdatedAt`, `t0`.`Id`, `t0`.`AgeCategory`, `t0`.`CreatedAt`, `t0`.`DivisionId`, `t0`.`IsDeleted`, `t0`.`Language`, `t0`.`MaxChildCount`, `t0`.`Name`, `t0`.`TeacherId`, `t0`.`UpdatedAt`, `a0`.`Id`, `a0`.`AccessFailedCount`, `a0`.`ConcurrencyStamp`, `a0`.`CreatedAt`, `a0`.`Email`, `a0`.`EmailConfirmed`, `a0`.`FirstName`, `a0`.`IsActive`, `a0`.`LastName`, `a0`.`LockoutEnabled`, `a0`.`LockoutEnd`, `a0`.`NormalizedEmail`, `a0`.`NormalizedUserName`, `a0`.`PasswordHash`, `a0`.`PhoneNumber`, `a0`.`PhoneNumberConfirmed`, `a0`.`Role`, `a0`.`SecurityStamp`, `a0`.`TwoFactorEnabled`, `a0`.`UserName`
FROM `attendances` AS `a`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `c`.`Id`, `c`.`CreatedAt`, `c`.`DateOfBirth`, `c`.`FaceIdToken`, `c`.`FirstName`, `c`.`GroupId`, `c`.`IsDeleted`, `c`.`LastName`, `c`.`MonthlyFee`, `c`.`ParentEmail`, `c`.`ParentFullName`, `c`.`ParentPhone`, `c`.`RegistrationDate`, `c`.`ScheduleType`, `c`.`Status`, `c`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `children` AS `c`
    WHERE NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t` ON `a`.`ChildId` = `t`.`Id`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `g`.`Id`, `g`.`AgeCategory`, `g`.`CreatedAt`, `g`.`DivisionId`, `g`.`IsDeleted`, `g`.`Language`, `g`.`MaxChildCount`, `g`.`Name`, `g`.`TeacherId`, `g`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `groups` AS `g`
    WHERE NOT (`g`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t0` ON `t`.`GroupId` = `t0`.`Id`
INNER JOIN `AspNetUsers` AS `a0` ON `a`.`RecordedById` = `a0`.`Id`

FROM `attendances` AS `a`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `c`.`Id`, `c`.`CreatedAt`, `c`.`DateOfBirth`, `c`.`FaceIdToken`, `c`.`FirstName`, `c`.`GroupId`, `c`.`IsDeleted`, `c`.`LastName`, `c`.`MonthlyFee`, `c`.`ParentEmail`, `c`.`ParentFullName`, `c`.`ParentPhone`, `c`.`RegistrationDate`, `c`.`ScheduleType`, `c`.`Status`, `c`.`UpdatedAt`

    WHERE NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t` ON `a`.`ChildId` = `t`.`Id`
INNER JOIN (

SELECT `a`.`Id`, `a`.`ArrivalTime`, `a`.`ChildId`, `a`.`CreatedAt`, `a`.`Date`, `a`.`DepartureTime`, `a`.`IsDeleted`, `a`.`IsEarlyLeave`, `a`.`IsLate`, `a`.`IsPresent`, `a`.`Notes`, `a`.`RecordedById`, `a`.`UpdatedAt`, `t`.`Id`, `t`.`CreatedAt`, `t`.`DateOfBirth`, `t`.`FaceIdToken`, `t`.`FirstName`, `t`.`GroupId`, `t`.`IsDeleted`, `t`.`LastName`, `t`.`MonthlyFee`, `t`.`ParentEmail`, `t`.`ParentFullName`, `t`.`ParentPhone`, `t`.`RegistrationDate`, `t`.`ScheduleType`, `t`.`Status`, `t`.`UpdatedAt`, `t0`.`Id`, `t0`.`AgeCategory`, `t0`.`CreatedAt`, `t0`.`DivisionId`, `t0`.`IsDeleted`, `t0`.`Language`, `t0`.`MaxChildCount`, `t0`.`Name`, `t0`.`TeacherId`, `t0`.`UpdatedAt`, `a0`.`Id`, `a0`.`AccessFailedCount`, `a0`.`ConcurrencyStamp`, `a0`.`CreatedAt`, `a0`.`Email`, `a0`.`EmailConfirmed`, `a0`.`FirstName`, `a0`.`IsActive`, `a0`.`LastName`, `a0`.`LockoutEnabled`, `a0`.`LockoutEnd`, `a0`.`NormalizedEmail`, `a0`.`NormalizedUserName`, `a0`.`PasswordHash`, `a0`.`PhoneNumber`, `a0`.`PhoneNumberConfirmed`, `a0`.`Role`, `a0`.`SecurityStamp`, `a0`.`TwoFactorEnabled`, `a0`.`UserName`
FROM `attendances` AS `a`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `c`.`Id`, `c`.`CreatedAt`, `c`.`DateOfBirth`, `c`.`FaceIdToken`, `c`.`FirstName`, `c`.`GroupId`, `c`.`IsDeleted`, `c`.`LastName`, `c`.`MonthlyFee`, `c`.`ParentEmail`, `c`.`ParentFullName`, `c`.`ParentPhone`, `c`.`RegistrationDate`, `c`.`ScheduleType`, `c`.`Status`, `c`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `children` AS `c`
    WHERE NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t` ON `a`.`ChildId` = `t`.`Id`
INNER JOIN (

    FROM `groups` AS `g`
    WHERE NOT (`g`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t0` ON `t`.`GroupId` = `t0`.`Id`
INNER JOIN `AspNetUsers` AS `a0` ON `a`.`RecordedById` = `a0`.`Id`
WHERE NOT (`a`.`IsDeleted`) AND (`a`.`Date` = @__date_0)

FROM `attendances` AS `a`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `c`.`Id`, `c`.`CreatedAt`, `c`.`DateOfBirth`, `c`.`FaceIdToken`, `c`.`FirstName`, `c`.`GroupId`, `c`.`IsDeleted`, `c`.`LastName`, `c`.`MonthlyFee`, `c`.`ParentEmail`, `c`.`ParentFullName`, `c`.`ParentPhone`, `c`.`RegistrationDate`, `c`.`ScheduleType`, `c`.`Status`, `c`.`UpdatedAt`

    WHERE NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t` ON `a`.`ChildId` = `t`.`Id`
INNER JOIN (

) AS `t0` ON `t`.`GroupId` = `t0`.`Id`

FROM `attendances` AS `a`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `c`.`Id`, `c`.`CreatedAt`, `c`.`DateOfBirth`, `c`.`FaceIdToken`, `c`.`FirstName`, `c`.`GroupId`, `c`.`IsDeleted`, `c`.`LastName`, `c`.`MonthlyFee`, `c`.`ParentEmail`, `c`.`ParentFullName`, `c`.`ParentPhone`, `c`.`RegistrationDate`, `c`.`ScheduleType`, `c`.`Status`, `c`.`UpdatedAt`

    WHERE NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t` ON `a`.`ChildId` = `t`.`Id`

) AS `t0` ON `t`.`GroupId` = `t0`.`Id`

SELECT `g`.`Id`, `g`.`AgeCategory`, `g`.`CreatedAt`, `g`.`DivisionId`, `g`.`IsDeleted`, `g`.`Language`, `g`.`MaxChildCount`, `g`.`Name`, `g`.`TeacherId`, `g`.`UpdatedAt`, `t`.`Id`, `t`.`CreatedAt`, `t`.`Description`, `t`.`IsDeleted`, `t`.`Language`, `t`.`Name`, `t`.`UpdatedAt`, `a`.`Id`, `a`.`AccessFailedCount`, `a`.`ConcurrencyStamp`, `a`.`CreatedAt`, `a`.`Email`, `a`.`EmailConfirmed`, `a`.`FirstName`, `a`.`IsActive`, `a`.`LastName`, `a`.`LockoutEnabled`, `a`.`LockoutEnd`, `a`.`NormalizedEmail`, `a`.`NormalizedUserName`, `a`.`PasswordHash`, `a`.`PhoneNumber`, `a`.`PhoneNumberConfirmed`, `a`.`Role`, `a`.`SecurityStamp`, `a`.`TwoFactorEnabled`, `a`.`UserName`, `t0`.`Id`, `t0`.`CreatedAt`, `t0`.`DateOfBirth`, `t0`.`FaceIdToken`, `t0`.`FirstName`, `t0`.`GroupId`, `t0`.`IsDeleted`, `t0`.`LastName`, `t0`.`MonthlyFee`, `t0`.`ParentEmail`, `t0`.`ParentFullName`, `t0`.`ParentPhone`, `t0`.`RegistrationDate`, `t0`.`ScheduleType`, `t0`.`Status`, `t0`.`UpdatedAt`
FROM `groups` AS `g`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `d`.`Id`, `d`.`CreatedAt`, `d`.`Description`, `d`.`IsDeleted`, `d`.`Language`, `d`.`Name`, `d`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `divisions` AS `d`
    WHERE NOT (`d`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t` ON `g`.`DivisionId` = `t`.`Id`
INNER JOIN `AspNetUsers` AS `a` ON `g`.`TeacherId` = `a`.`Id`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `c`.`Id`, `c`.`CreatedAt`, `c`.`DateOfBirth`, `c`.`FaceIdToken`, `c`.`FirstName`, `c`.`GroupId`, `c`.`IsDeleted`, `c`.`LastName`, `c`.`MonthlyFee`, `c`.`ParentEmail`, `c`.`ParentFullName`, `c`.`ParentPhone`, `c`.`RegistrationDate`, `c`.`ScheduleType`, `c`.`Status`, `c`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `children` AS `c`
    WHERE NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`) AND NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t0` ON `g`.`Id` = `t0`.`GroupId`
WHERE NOT (`g`.`IsDeleted`)
ORDER BY `g`.`Id`, `t`.`Id`, `a`.`Id`

SELECT `a`.`Id`, `a`.`ArrivalTime`, `a`.`ChildId`, `a`.`CreatedAt`, `a`.`Date`, `a`.`DepartureTime`, `a`.`IsDeleted`, `a`.`IsEarlyLeave`, `a`.`IsLate`, `a`.`IsPresent`, `a`.`Notes`, `a`.`RecordedById`, `a`.`UpdatedAt`, `t`.`Id`, `t`.`CreatedAt`, `t`.`DateOfBirth`, `t`.`FaceIdToken`, `t`.`FirstName`, `t`.`GroupId`, `t`.`IsDeleted`, `t`.`LastName`, `t`.`MonthlyFee`, `t`.`ParentEmail`, `t`.`ParentFullName`, `t`.`ParentPhone`, `t`.`RegistrationDate`, `t`.`ScheduleType`, `t`.`Status`, `t`.`UpdatedAt`, `t0`.`Id`, `t0`.`AgeCategory`, `t0`.`CreatedAt`, `t0`.`DivisionId`, `t0`.`IsDeleted`, `t0`.`Language`, `t0`.`MaxChildCount`, `t0`.`Name`, `t0`.`TeacherId`, `t0`.`UpdatedAt`, `a0`.`Id`, `a0`.`AccessFailedCount`, `a0`.`ConcurrencyStamp`, `a0`.`CreatedAt`, `a0`.`Email`, `a0`.`EmailConfirmed`, `a0`.`FirstName`, `a0`.`IsActive`, `a0`.`LastName`, `a0`.`LockoutEnabled`, `a0`.`LockoutEnd`, `a0`.`NormalizedEmail`, `a0`.`NormalizedUserName`, `a0`.`PasswordHash`, `a0`.`PhoneNumber`, `a0`.`PhoneNumberConfirmed`, `a0`.`Role`, `a0`.`SecurityStamp`, `a0`.`TwoFactorEnabled`, `a0`.`UserName`
FROM `attendances` AS `a`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `c`.`Id`, `c`.`CreatedAt`, `c`.`DateOfBirth`, `c`.`FaceIdToken`, `c`.`FirstName`, `c`.`GroupId`, `c`.`IsDeleted`, `c`.`LastName`, `c`.`MonthlyFee`, `c`.`ParentEmail`, `c`.`ParentFullName`, `c`.`ParentPhone`, `c`.`RegistrationDate`, `c`.`ScheduleType`, `c`.`Status`, `c`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `children` AS `c`
    WHERE NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t` ON `a`.`ChildId` = `t`.`Id`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `g`.`Id`, `g`.`AgeCategory`, `g`.`CreatedAt`, `g`.`DivisionId`, `g`.`IsDeleted`, `g`.`Language`, `g`.`MaxChildCount`, `g`.`Name`, `g`.`TeacherId`, `g`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `groups` AS `g`
    WHERE NOT (`g`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t0` ON `t`.`GroupId` = `t0`.`Id`

SELECT `a`.`Id`, `a`.`ArrivalTime`, `a`.`ChildId`, `a`.`CreatedAt`, `a`.`Date`, `a`.`DepartureTime`, `a`.`IsDeleted`, `a`.`IsEarlyLeave`, `a`.`IsLate`, `a`.`IsPresent`, `a`.`Notes`, `a`.`RecordedById`, `a`.`UpdatedAt`, `t`.`Id`, `t`.`CreatedAt`, `t`.`DateOfBirth`, `t`.`FaceIdToken`, `t`.`FirstName`, `t`.`GroupId`, `t`.`IsDeleted`, `t`.`LastName`, `t`.`MonthlyFee`, `t`.`ParentEmail`, `t`.`ParentFullName`, `t`.`ParentPhone`, `t`.`RegistrationDate`, `t`.`ScheduleType`, `t`.`Status`, `t`.`UpdatedAt`, `t0`.`Id`, `t0`.`AgeCategory`, `t0`.`CreatedAt`, `t0`.`DivisionId`, `t0`.`IsDeleted`, `t0`.`Language`, `t0`.`MaxChildCount`, `t0`.`Name`, `t0`.`TeacherId`, `t0`.`UpdatedAt`, `a0`.`Id`, `a0`.`AccessFailedCount`, `a0`.`ConcurrencyStamp`, `a0`.`CreatedAt`, `a0`.`Email`, `a0`.`EmailConfirmed`, `a0`.`FirstName`, `a0`.`IsActive`, `a0`.`LastName`, `a0`.`LockoutEnabled`, `a0`.`LockoutEnd`, `a0`.`NormalizedEmail`, `a0`.`NormalizedUserName`, `a0`.`PasswordHash`, `a0`.`PhoneNumber`, `a0`.`PhoneNumberConfirmed`, `a0`.`Role`, `a0`.`SecurityStamp`, `a0`.`TwoFactorEnabled`, `a0`.`UserName`
FROM `attendances` AS `a`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `c`.`Id`, `c`.`CreatedAt`, `c`.`DateOfBirth`, `c`.`FaceIdToken`, `c`.`FirstName`, `c`.`GroupId`, `c`.`IsDeleted`, `c`.`LastName`, `c`.`MonthlyFee`, `c`.`ParentEmail`, `c`.`ParentFullName`, `c`.`ParentPhone`, `c`.`RegistrationDate`, `c`.`ScheduleType`, `c`.`Status`, `c`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `children` AS `c`
    WHERE NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t` ON `a`.`ChildId` = `t`.`Id`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `g`.`Id`, `g`.`AgeCategory`, `g`.`CreatedAt`, `g`.`DivisionId`, `g`.`IsDeleted`, `g`.`Language`, `g`.`MaxChildCount`, `g`.`Name`, `g`.`TeacherId`, `g`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `groups` AS `g`
    WHERE NOT (`g`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t0` ON `t`.`GroupId` = `t0`.`Id`
INNER JOIN `AspNetUsers` AS `a0` ON `a`.`RecordedById` = `a0`.`Id`
WHERE NOT (`a`.`IsDeleted`) AND (`a`.`Date` = @__date_0)

SELECT `g`.`Id`, `g`.`AgeCategory`, `g`.`CreatedAt`, `g`.`DivisionId`, `g`.`IsDeleted`, `g`.`Language`, `g`.`MaxChildCount`, `g`.`Name`, `g`.`TeacherId`, `g`.`UpdatedAt`, `t`.`Id`, `t`.`CreatedAt`, `t`.`Description`, `t`.`IsDeleted`, `t`.`Language`, `t`.`Name`, `t`.`UpdatedAt`, `a`.`Id`, `a`.`AccessFailedCount`, `a`.`ConcurrencyStamp`, `a`.`CreatedAt`, `a`.`Email`, `a`.`EmailConfirmed`, `a`.`FirstName`, `a`.`IsActive`, `a`.`LastName`, `a`.`LockoutEnabled`, `a`.`LockoutEnd`, `a`.`NormalizedEmail`, `a`.`NormalizedUserName`, `a`.`PasswordHash`, `a`.`PhoneNumber`, `a`.`PhoneNumberConfirmed`, `a`.`Role`, `a`.`SecurityStamp`, `a`.`TwoFactorEnabled`, `a`.`UserName`, `t0`.`Id`, `t0`.`CreatedAt`, `t0`.`DateOfBirth`, `t0`.`FaceIdToken`, `t0`.`FirstName`, `t0`.`GroupId`, `t0`.`IsDeleted`, `t0`.`LastName`, `t0`.`MonthlyFee`, `t0`.`ParentEmail`, `t0`.`ParentFullName`, `t0`.`ParentPhone`, `t0`.`RegistrationDate`, `t0`.`ScheduleType`, `t0`.`Status`, `t0`.`UpdatedAt`
FROM `groups` AS `g`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `d`.`Id`, `d`.`CreatedAt`, `d`.`Description`, `d`.`IsDeleted`, `d`.`Language`, `d`.`Name`, `d`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `divisions` AS `d`
    WHERE NOT (`d`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t` ON `g`.`DivisionId` = `t`.`Id`
INNER JOIN `AspNetUsers` AS `a` ON `g`.`TeacherId` = `a`.`Id`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `c`.`Id`, `c`.`CreatedAt`, `c`.`DateOfBirth`, `c`.`FaceIdToken`, `c`.`FirstName`, `c`.`GroupId`, `c`.`IsDeleted`, `c`.`LastName`, `c`.`MonthlyFee`, `c`.`ParentEmail`, `c`.`ParentFullName`, `c`.`ParentPhone`, `c`.`RegistrationDate`, `c`.`ScheduleType`, `c`.`Status`, `c`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `children` AS `c`
    WHERE NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`) AND NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t0` ON `g`.`Id` = `t0`.`GroupId`
WHERE NOT (`g`.`IsDeleted`)
ORDER BY `g`.`Id`, `t`.`Id`, `a`.`Id`

SELECT `g`.`Id`, `g`.`AgeCategory`, `g`.`CreatedAt`, `g`.`DivisionId`, `g`.`IsDeleted`, `g`.`Language`, `g`.`MaxChildCount`, `g`.`Name`, `g`.`TeacherId`, `g`.`UpdatedAt`, `t`.`Id`, `t`.`CreatedAt`, `t`.`Description`, `t`.`IsDeleted`, `t`.`Language`, `t`.`Name`, `t`.`UpdatedAt`, `a`.`Id`, `a`.`AccessFailedCount`, `a`.`ConcurrencyStamp`, `a`.`CreatedAt`, `a`.`Email`, `a`.`EmailConfirmed`, `a`.`FirstName`, `a`.`IsActive`, `a`.`LastName`, `a`.`LockoutEnabled`, `a`.`LockoutEnd`, `a`.`NormalizedEmail`, `a`.`NormalizedUserName`, `a`.`PasswordHash`, `a`.`PhoneNumber`, `a`.`PhoneNumberConfirmed`, `a`.`Role`, `a`.`SecurityStamp`, `a`.`TwoFactorEnabled`, `a`.`UserName`, `t0`.`Id`, `t0`.`CreatedAt`, `t0`.`DateOfBirth`, `t0`.`FaceIdToken`, `t0`.`FirstName`, `t0`.`GroupId`, `t0`.`IsDeleted`, `t0`.`LastName`, `t0`.`MonthlyFee`, `t0`.`ParentEmail`, `t0`.`ParentFullName`, `t0`.`ParentPhone`, `t0`.`RegistrationDate`, `t0`.`ScheduleType`, `t0`.`Status`, `t0`.`UpdatedAt`
FROM `groups` AS `g`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `d`.`Id`, `d`.`CreatedAt`, `d`.`Description`, `d`.`IsDeleted`, `d`.`Language`, `d`.`Name`, `d`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `divisions` AS `d`
    WHERE NOT (`d`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t` ON `g`.`DivisionId` = `t`.`Id`
INNER JOIN `AspNetUsers` AS `a` ON `g`.`TeacherId` = `a`.`Id`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `c`.`Id`, `c`.`CreatedAt`, `c`.`DateOfBirth`, `c`.`FaceIdToken`, `c`.`FirstName`, `c`.`GroupId`, `c`.`IsDeleted`, `c`.`LastName`, `c`.`MonthlyFee`, `c`.`ParentEmail`, `c`.`ParentFullName`, `c`.`ParentPhone`, `c`.`RegistrationDate`, `c`.`ScheduleType`, `c`.`Status`, `c`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `children` AS `c`
    WHERE NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`) AND NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t0` ON `g`.`Id` = `t0`.`GroupId`
WHERE NOT (`g`.`IsDeleted`)
ORDER BY `g`.`Id`, `t`.`Id`, `a`.`Id`

SELECT `g`.`Id`, `g`.`AgeCategory`, `g`.`CreatedAt`, `g`.`DivisionId`, `g`.`IsDeleted`, `g`.`Language`, `g`.`MaxChildCount`, `g`.`Name`, `g`.`TeacherId`, `g`.`UpdatedAt`, `t`.`Id`, `t`.`CreatedAt`, `t`.`Description`, `t`.`IsDeleted`, `t`.`Language`, `t`.`Name`, `t`.`UpdatedAt`, `a`.`Id`, `a`.`AccessFailedCount`, `a`.`ConcurrencyStamp`, `a`.`CreatedAt`, `a`.`Email`, `a`.`EmailConfirmed`, `a`.`FirstName`, `a`.`IsActive`, `a`.`LastName`, `a`.`LockoutEnabled`, `a`.`LockoutEnd`, `a`.`NormalizedEmail`, `a`.`NormalizedUserName`, `a`.`PasswordHash`, `a`.`PhoneNumber`, `a`.`PhoneNumberConfirmed`, `a`.`Role`, `a`.`SecurityStamp`, `a`.`TwoFactorEnabled`, `a`.`UserName`, `t0`.`Id`, `t0`.`CreatedAt`, `t0`.`DateOfBirth`, `t0`.`FaceIdToken`, `t0`.`FirstName`, `t0`.`GroupId`, `t0`.`IsDeleted`, `t0`.`LastName`, `t0`.`MonthlyFee`, `t0`.`ParentEmail`, `t0`.`ParentFullName`, `t0`.`ParentPhone`, `t0`.`RegistrationDate`, `t0`.`ScheduleType`, `t0`.`Status`, `t0`.`UpdatedAt`
FROM `groups` AS `g`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `d`.`Id`, `d`.`CreatedAt`, `d`.`Description`, `d`.`IsDeleted`, `d`.`Language`, `d`.`Name`, `d`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `divisions` AS `d`
    WHERE NOT (`d`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t` ON `g`.`DivisionId` = `t`.`Id`
INNER JOIN `AspNetUsers` AS `a` ON `g`.`TeacherId` = `a`.`Id`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `c`.`Id`, `c`.`CreatedAt`, `c`.`DateOfBirth`, `c`.`FaceIdToken`, `c`.`FirstName`, `c`.`GroupId`, `c`.`IsDeleted`, `c`.`LastName`, `c`.`MonthlyFee`, `c`.`ParentEmail`, `c`.`ParentFullName`, `c`.`ParentPhone`, `c`.`RegistrationDate`, `c`.`ScheduleType`, `c`.`Status`, `c`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `children` AS `c`
    WHERE NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`) AND NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t0` ON `g`.`Id` = `t0`.`GroupId`
WHERE NOT (`g`.`IsDeleted`)
ORDER BY `g`.`Id`, `t`.`Id`, `a`.`Id`

) AS `t0` ON `g`.`Id` = `t0`.`GroupId`
WHERE NOT (`g`.`IsDeleted`)
ORDER BY `g`.`Id`, `t`.`Id`, `a`.`Id`

) AS `t0` ON `g`.`Id` = `t0`.`GroupId`

SELECT `g`.`Id`, `g`.`AgeCategory`, `g`.`CreatedAt`, `g`.`DivisionId`, `g`.`IsDeleted`, `g`.`Language`, `g`.`MaxChildCount`, `g`.`Name`, `g`.`TeacherId`, `g`.`UpdatedAt`, `t`.`Id`, `t`.`CreatedAt`, `t`.`Description`, `t`.`IsDeleted`, `t`.`Language`, `t`.`Name`, `t`.`UpdatedAt`, `a`.`Id`, `a`.`AccessFailedCount`, `a`.`ConcurrencyStamp`, `a`.`CreatedAt`, `a`.`Email`, `a`.`EmailConfirmed`, `a`.`FirstName`, `a`.`IsActive`, `a`.`LastName`, `a`.`LockoutEnabled`, `a`.`LockoutEnd`, `a`.`NormalizedEmail`, `a`.`NormalizedUserName`, `a`.`PasswordHash`, `a`.`PhoneNumber`, `a`.`PhoneNumberConfirmed`, `a`.`Role`, `a`.`SecurityStamp`, `a`.`TwoFactorEnabled`, `a`.`UserName`, `t0`.`Id`, `t0`.`CreatedAt`, `t0`.`DateOfBirth`, `t0`.`FaceIdToken`, `t0`.`FirstName`, `t0`.`GroupId`, `t0`.`IsDeleted`, `t0`.`LastName`, `t0`.`MonthlyFee`, `t0`.`ParentEmail`, `t0`.`ParentFullName`, `t0`.`ParentPhone`, `t0`.`RegistrationDate`, `t0`.`ScheduleType`, `t0`.`Status`, `t0`.`UpdatedAt`
FROM `groups` AS `g`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `d`.`Id`, `d`.`CreatedAt`, `d`.`Description`, `d`.`IsDeleted`, `d`.`Language`, `d`.`Name`, `d`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `divisions` AS `d`
    WHERE NOT (`d`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t` ON `g`.`DivisionId` = `t`.`Id`
INNER JOIN `AspNetUsers` AS `a` ON `g`.`TeacherId` = `a`.`Id`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `c`.`Id`, `c`.`CreatedAt`, `c`.`DateOfBirth`, `c`.`FaceIdToken`, `c`.`FirstName`, `c`.`GroupId`, `c`.`IsDeleted`, `c`.`LastName`, `c`.`MonthlyFee`, `c`.`ParentEmail`, `c`.`ParentFullName`, `c`.`ParentPhone`, `c`.`RegistrationDate`, `c`.`ScheduleType`, `c`.`Status`, `c`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `children` AS `c`
    WHERE NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`) AND NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t0` ON `g`.`Id` = `t0`.`GroupId`
WHERE NOT (`g`.`IsDeleted`)
ORDER BY `g`.`Id`, `t`.`Id`, `a`.`Id`

) AS `t` ON `p`.`ChildId` = `t`.`Id`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `g`.`Id`, `g`.`AgeCategory`, `g`.`CreatedAt`, `g`.`DivisionId`, `g`.`IsDeleted`, `g`.`Language`, `g`.`MaxChildCount`, `g`.`Name`, `g`.`TeacherId`, `g`.`UpdatedAt`

) AS `t0` ON `t`.`GroupId` = `t0`.`Id`

) AS `t0` ON `g`.`Id` = `t0`.`GroupId`

    SELECT `c`.`Id`, `c`.`CreatedAt`, `c`.`DateOfBirth`, `c`.`FaceIdToken`, `c`.`FirstName`, `c`.`GroupId`, `c`.`IsDeleted`, `c`.`LastName`, `c`.`MonthlyFee`, `c`.`ParentEmail`, `c`.`ParentFullName`, `c`.`ParentPhone`, `c`.`RegistrationDate`, `c`.`ScheduleType`, `c`.`Status`, `c`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `children` AS `c`
    WHERE NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t` ON `a`.`ChildId` = `t`.`Id`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `g`.`Id`, `g`.`AgeCategory`, `g`.`CreatedAt`, `g`.`DivisionId`, `g`.`IsDeleted`, `g`.`Language`, `g`.`MaxChildCount`, `g`.`Name`, `g`.`TeacherId`, `g`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `groups` AS `g`
    WHERE NOT (`g`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t0` ON `t`.`GroupId` = `t0`.`Id`
INNER JOIN `AspNetUsers` AS `a0` ON `a`.`RecordedById` = `a0`.`Id`
WHERE NOT (`a`.`IsDeleted`) AND (`a`.`Date` = @__date_0)

SELECT `g`.`Id`, `g`.`AgeCategory`, `g`.`CreatedAt`, `g`.`DivisionId`, `g`.`IsDeleted`, `g`.`Language`, `g`.`MaxChildCount`, `g`.`Name`, `g`.`TeacherId`, `g`.`UpdatedAt`, `t`.`Id`, `t`.`CreatedAt`, `t`.`Description`, `t`.`IsDeleted`, `t`.`Language`, `t`.`Name`, `t`.`UpdatedAt`, `a`.`Id`, `a`.`AccessFailedCount`, `a`.`ConcurrencyStamp`, `a`.`CreatedAt`, `a`.`Email`, `a`.`EmailConfirmed`, `a`.`FirstName`, `a`.`IsActive`, `a`.`LastName`, `a`.`LockoutEnabled`, `a`.`LockoutEnd`, `a`.`NormalizedEmail`, `a`.`NormalizedUserName`, `a`.`PasswordHash`, `a`.`PhoneNumber`, `a`.`PhoneNumberConfirmed`, `a`.`Role`, `a`.`SecurityStamp`, `a`.`TwoFactorEnabled`, `a`.`UserName`, `t0`.`Id`, `t0`.`CreatedAt`, `t0`.`DateOfBirth`, `t0`.`FaceIdToken`, `t0`.`FirstName`, `t0`.`GroupId`, `t0`.`IsDeleted`, `t0`.`LastName`, `t0`.`MonthlyFee`, `t0`.`ParentEmail`, `t0`.`ParentFullName`, `t0`.`ParentPhone`, `t0`.`RegistrationDate`, `t0`.`ScheduleType`, `t0`.`Status`, `t0`.`UpdatedAt`
FROM `groups` AS `g`

    FROM `divisions` AS `d`
    WHERE NOT (`d`.`IsDeleted`)

    WHERE NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`) AND NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t0` ON `g`.`Id` = `t0`.`GroupId`
WHERE NOT (`g`.`IsDeleted`)
ORDER BY `g`.`Id`, `t`.`Id`, `a`.`Id`

FROM `attendances` AS `a`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `c`.`Id`, `c`.`CreatedAt`, `c`.`DateOfBirth`, `c`.`FaceIdToken`, `c`.`FirstName`, `c`.`GroupId`, `c`.`IsDeleted`, `c`.`LastName`, `c`.`MonthlyFee`, `c`.`ParentEmail`, `c`.`ParentFullName`, `c`.`ParentPhone`, `c`.`RegistrationDate`, `c`.`ScheduleType`, `c`.`Status`, `c`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `children` AS `c`
    WHERE NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t` ON `a`.`ChildId` = `t`.`Id`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `g`.`Id`, `g`.`AgeCategory`, `g`.`CreatedAt`, `g`.`DivisionId`, `g`.`IsDeleted`, `g`.`Language`, `g`.`MaxChildCount`, `g`.`Name`, `g`.`TeacherId`, `g`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `groups` AS `g`
    WHERE NOT (`g`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t0` ON `t`.`GroupId` = `t0`.`Id`
INNER JOIN `AspNetUsers` AS `a0` ON `a`.`RecordedById` = `a0`.`Id`
WHERE NOT (`a`.`IsDeleted`) AND (`a`.`Date` = @__date_0)

FROM `groups` AS `g`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `d`.`Id`, `d`.`CreatedAt`, `d`.`Description`, `d`.`IsDeleted`, `d`.`Language`, `d`.`Name`, `d`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `divisions` AS `d`
    WHERE NOT (`d`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t` ON `g`.`DivisionId` = `t`.`Id`
INNER JOIN `AspNetUsers` AS `a` ON `g`.`TeacherId` = `a`.`Id`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `c`.`Id`, `c`.`CreatedAt`, `c`.`DateOfBirth`, `c`.`FaceIdToken`, `c`.`FirstName`, `c`.`GroupId`, `c`.`IsDeleted`, `c`.`LastName`, `c`.`MonthlyFee`, `c`.`ParentEmail`, `c`.`ParentFullName`, `c`.`ParentPhone`, `c`.`RegistrationDate`, `c`.`ScheduleType`, `c`.`Status`, `c`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `children` AS `c`
    WHERE NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`) AND NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t0` ON `g`.`Id` = `t0`.`GroupId`
WHERE NOT (`g`.`IsDeleted`)
ORDER BY `g`.`Id`, `t`.`Id`, `a`.`Id`

FROM `payments` AS `p`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `c`.`Id`, `c`.`CreatedAt`, `c`.`DateOfBirth`, `c`.`FaceIdToken`, `c`.`FirstName`, `c`.`GroupId`, `c`.`IsDeleted`, `c`.`LastName`, `c`.`MonthlyFee`, `c`.`ParentEmail`, `c`.`ParentFullName`, `c`.`ParentPhone`, `c`.`RegistrationDate`, `c`.`ScheduleType`, `c`.`Status`, `c`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `children` AS `c`
    WHERE NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t` ON `p`.`ChildId` = `t`.`Id`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `g`.`Id`, `g`.`AgeCategory`, `g`.`CreatedAt`, `g`.`DivisionId`, `g`.`IsDeleted`, `g`.`Language`, `g`.`MaxChildCount`, `g`.`Name`, `g`.`TeacherId`, `g`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `groups` AS `g`
    WHERE NOT (`g`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t0` ON `t`.`GroupId` = `t0`.`Id`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `d`.`Id`, `d`.`CreatedAt`, `d`.`Description`, `d`.`IsDeleted`, `d`.`Language`, `d`.`Name`, `d`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `divisions` AS `d`
    WHERE NOT (`d`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t1` ON `t0`.`DivisionId` = `t1`.`Id`
WHERE NOT (`p`.`IsDeleted`) AND `p`.`Status` IN (2, 1)
ORDER BY `p`.`Year` DESC, `p`.`Month` DESC
